sequence: 领域外的归途  一　记忆螺旋

记忆螺旋.say: 似雾似水的奈落烟尘之上，一艘巨舰正在快速行驶着。

sequence: 赤城号量产舰
指挥甲板
返航途中

记忆螺旋.say: 外面的环境虽然怪异……不过那些烟尘之上居然真的能行船啊。
是啊，起航三个小时以来一切顺利，真希望这份顺利能持续下去。
不知道我还要开多久的船？
根据观察者计算，以我们当前所处的赤城号量产舰为基准的话，至少还需要开七个小时。
七个小时……这样返程全程时间就达到了十个多小时呢。
明明进入世界切片的时候只花了一瞬间。
毕竟我们绕路了。
十个小时就能从重樱本岛直达NA海域中心，这么一想倒也不算特别慢？
唔，指挥官这么一说的话……倒确实！
以NA海域的时间来算，我们回去需要多久？
似乎要大于七个小时，具体时间观察者没说，只是扔了一堆公式过来。
你要亲自算算么？
不必……
连续指挥已经很累了吧？
这里有我看着就够了，你可以先去休息会。
没事，我再观察一段时间，我还是第一次来到赤城号量产舰的驾驶室里。
本来我还以为返航的船会选用信浓的量产型呢。
从舒适度的角度考虑，确实使用信浓号量产型比较好。
不过……我个人是不推荐乘坐信浓号量产型出门的。
嗯？这个理由怎么和观察者跟我说的一模一样……
难道这件事真的有什么说法？
倒也没什么，你就当讨个彩头好了？
刷刷——
耳边，似乎传来了洗牌的声音。
红雾弥漫，吞噬了整片空间。
明亮的房间中，一个身影停留在黑板前。
助手，你有在认真听么？！
刚刚正好讲到重点部分了欸！
喂……别睡别睡，再坚持一下！
助手——
宽敞的办公室中，一个身影递来了名片。
欧西斯商业联合，柯蕾。
{playername}阁下，预祝我们合作愉快。
昏暗的房间中，一个身影埋没在屏幕中。
{playername}！这次实验……终于——成功了！
哼哼~不愧是能和奥斯塔玩到一起去的人。
让我们一同用这项研究……给那群冥顽不化的人来点小小震撼吧~
沉闷的会议室中，许多虚影围坐在圆桌旁。
会议已经结束了。很遗憾，我们的修正提案没有在理事会得到多数票的支持。
计划仍将按照原定方案推行。
是时候做出决断了，{playername}将军。
教室中，少女看着面前的涂鸦本。
……老师……安克雷奇画的……好看么……
……老师……明天……就要走了么……
……老师……不要去……
银白色的海面上，少女们正在战斗。
指挥官……？
你怎么还在……？
萨拉，快带指挥官走！
指挥官……
无穷无尽的场景在眼前快速流转着。
……能听见……
大脑仿佛被扔入了一台高速旋转的离心机。
……我说话……么……
意识在螺旋中断开、裂解、下沉。
指挥官……！
我这是……？
终于，旋转停止了。
这里是赤城号的指挥甲板，面前是焦虑的孟菲斯。
……指挥官，你吓死我了。
刚才我见到你在睁眼走神！整个人就像被定住一样，怎么喊你都没反应……
走神……？持续了大概多久？
一分多钟吧！……指挥官，发生什么事了么？
一分多钟……？
（意识之中经历了无数场景，现实中只过去一分多中么……）
没事，只是有些疲劳，稍微走神了。
呼，那就好……只是走神了么。
你看我说什么，这就叫关心则乱。
你知道么，在第三声没喊醒你的时候，她就想去拉全舰警报了。
还好我让你这个小秘书多等了等。
……谨慎一点又没什么错。
{playername}阁下，就现状而言，你确实该去休息了。
嗯……我同意。
（虽然不知道刚才异状出现的原因……但此刻的精神，确实已经无法集中了。）
我让瑞鹤在房间里准备了些简单的点心，路上时间还长，吃一些垫垫肚子吧。
有劳了。
那指挥官，我带你去休息室吧？
正在努力回忆前往休息室的路线时，孟菲斯靠近过来，轻轻扶住了我的肩。
路线的话，这边走~
我说，小秘书。“指挥官”去休息，你也要跟着么？
当然了，这可是工作的一环。
工作？行吧……既然你也要走的话，把这盘水果带上吧。
赤城指了指摆放在桌子上的果盘。
……水果？
给{playername}阁下剥着吃啊，不然呢？
给，拿着哦。
就这样，有些愣神的孟菲斯呆呆的拿着果盘和我一同离开了指挥甲板。
等等……不对……这个女人拿我当什么人了！
算了……不跟她一般见识。
指挥官，休息要紧，我们快走吧~

sequence: 领域外的归途  二　金狐之策

金狐之策.say: 原本作为仪式阵法核心的龙宫城，此刻已经沉入了深海之中。
金色、蓝色与堇色交织而成的虚幻天空下，一行少女正在各自忙碌着。
诸位，伴随仪式出现的残存之敌已全部清理完毕了。
城内安全了。
我这边关于龙宫城内的损失评估也完成了。
外层损失约三点五成，中层损失约二点四成，内层损失约一点六成。
比预想中要严重不少呢。
嗯……所幸城内储备物资足够，无需花时间再从外部调动资源了。
维修所需时间呢？
大约三天。
三天么……大结界受到奈落的侵蚀严重，只能希望这三天内别再出什么事了。
如果是这样的话，我可以先开始布置次级阵枢？
这样等伊吹那边完成修复后，我这边也差不多布置好了。
之后我们可以一同执行仪式，直接利用龙宫城的力量开展大结界的修复工作。
嗯，就如此办吧。
一束流光从空中落下。光华流转，凝聚成了一位少女的虚影。
云仙大人？！
呵呵，诸位辛苦了。
大和大人有话要对诸位说。
虚影之中金光闪现，少女的身形虽然没有改变，不过气质已经大不相同了。
「龙宫城如何？」
大和大人，龙宫城的损失比预期要严重，预计三日后才能开始大结界的修复工作。
「了然。」
「另一事呢？」
那边已经安排妥当，正在顺利回收中。
「拼合完毕后，将蟒蛇一同放入返魂仪式的阵枢中。」
遵命。
好啦，大和大人已经去专心准备返魂仪式了，我也不打扰了。
少女随手一挥，声音与身影伴随四散的光华一同消失了。
呼……为了确保返魂仪式的顺利进行，我们必须尽快修复大结界才行。
诸位，继续工作吧——

sequence: 领域外的归途  三　解离感
赤城号量产舰
休息室
返航途中

解离感.say: 与孟菲斯一同来到休息室后，休息室的桌子上果然已经摆上了几盘点心。
哇哦，真是精致的点心啊。
孟菲斯将果盘放在一旁，对着桌上的点心仔细详观起来。
与欧罗巴流行的点心风格不同，和在东煌见到的也有差异。
这就是重樱风格的点心么……指挥官，来尝尝么？
孟菲斯选了一串点心递了过来。
……一串糯米团？
嗯，这是一种在重樱被称为“团子”的点心，确实主要是由糯米制作的。
口味的话……这一串是红色的，或许是红豆味？
一串有三个，指挥官吃两个……我吃一个怎么样？
嗯……也好，是有些饿了。
滴——（警报音）
这是……全舰警报？
啊，指挥官小心——
突如其来的晃动让我的身体陷入了失衡之中。
（不对，不光是身体上的失衡，还有意识上的……）
刷刷——
（？！这个声音是——）
巨大的耳鸣声中，意识勉强集中了起来。
（我这是……在某个高速移动的机械中？）
视野之中，只能看到一片幽幽蓝光。
（完全无法移动身体……所有关节都被束缚住了么……？）
（可是又没有感受到压迫力，到底是怎么回事……）
……没想到，这么快就追过来了。
（……这个声音，似乎有些耳熟……）
计划的本质被察觉了？
还是说，它们的封锁包围比我们预测中更彻底？
继续释放诱饵编队，引导它们分散追兵，前往错误的坐标。
只要再离开这个世纪，我们就安全了。
是。
远方的声音消失了。
（有两个声音，一个有些耳熟，另一个则完全没有印象。）
（……不行，音色失真太多，辨认不出来。）
（……不能被继续困在这里了，得想个办法脱困才行。）
虽然所有关节都因为某种未知的束缚无法移动，不过眼球显然不在此列。
集中精神，利用唯一可以转动的眼球尽可能观察周边环境时，我突然发现了一件怪异的事。
（余光之中……看不到鼻子？）
（……这怎么可能？）
（就算全身关节都被束缚住了，可是……怎么会看不到鼻子。）
（难道，无法移动不是因为关节被束缚而是……）
一个恐怖又有些荒唐的念头出现在脑海中。
仿佛是被这个念头所惊吓，幽蓝色的空间开始抖动起来。
意识在这愈发剧烈的抖动中逐渐消散——
抖动突兀的停止了。
恍惚间，仿佛看到了一片转瞬即逝的蓝色花海。
还有一个与花海一同离去的身影。
落花之中，银发飞扬。
光芒消散后，映入眼帘的是……孟菲斯？
欢迎回来，指挥官。
……孟菲斯？
是我，但——不是你想的那个我。
她的话，已经被我打发去排查舰体损伤了。
虽然其实根本没有损伤就是了~
哈哈……怎么不光是赤城，连你也欺负她。
因为好玩嘛。
你现在感觉如何，有没有什么难受的地方？
嗯……目前感觉一切正常。
对了，你怎么来了？
当然是来帮忙咯。
欸~应该说是，好不容易，我终于能来帮忙了。
都怪海伦娜的偏心安排，要不是你们临时绕路，这次根本就没有我出场的机会，更别提来这里帮你了。
……海伦娜的偏心安排？
啊——没什么，口误、口误。
好吧……对了，刚刚的警报和晃动是怎么回事？
还有我刚才……应该是昏迷了吧？这又是怎么回事？
出现警报是因为在奈落之中出现了涌动现象，导致了奈落烟尘的大幅激荡。
……“涌动现象”？
嗯，一种会在奈落之中随机发生的危险现象。
一旦被激荡的涌动的烟尘所裹挟进奈落深处的未知地带，或许就要永远迷失在里面了哦。
至于昏迷现象，应该也是由于突如其来的涌动引起的。
不过放心，目前我们已经脱离危险区了~
原来如此，奈落之中确实危险重重……
这次我昏迷了多久？
七分多一点，不到八分钟。
（上次是发呆，这次是昏迷，而且时间变长了……）
看你是一脸疲惫的样子，还是再休息一下吧！
与此同时，某个特殊空间中。
第二次了，你对于这段通道的控制力正在减弱？
我要调动更多「塔」的力量去稳定通道，导航就全部交给你了。
还有这些权限也暂时交给你，善用。
蓝色的光芒星星点点落入了观察者的眼中。
这就是……「塔」的权限？！
要不是验证环节完全不同，我还以为连接上自然进化演算系统了呢！
早就听说了它的能力不简单，没想到它居然能够如此厉害且……全面。
凭借「塔」的力量……就算构建出一个全新的塞壬网络……也是没问题的吧？
……「塔」到底是什么东西？
话太多了，先顾好眼前的事。
哼哼~我现在难得充满了干劲，放心吧~！

sequence: 领域外的归途  四　彼岸之援

彼岸之援.say: 水面之上，御狐翩然起舞。
天空之上，星轨随之于流光中变动着。
一轮又一轮明月碰撞着，在扭曲中变为了流光的一部分。
终于，空中只剩下了两轮明月。
群星归位，仪式似乎迎来了尾声。
……返魂仪式的准备？
一回来就看到了大手笔啊……
借出力量就算了，至于帮到这种程度么？
能让汝吃个大亏，还不能成为余重视的理由？
此次「窥探」的结果如何？
姑且算你是对的吧。
不过她们就算再厉害，也不过是一群来自塞壬实验场的人而已。
汝难道不是么？
不再是了。不论你是否承认，我们与她们……在存在的「层次」上已经完全不同了。
那又如何？
——神，也是有强弱之分的。
总而言之，我放弃报复计划了。但是，我也不打算支持你这个计划。
我要走了，一段时间内都不会回来了。
无妨，去做汝认定之事吧。
吾等目标一致，纵有分歧，终将相会。
告辞。
需要我去盯着她么？
罢了。吾等本就有各自做出选择的权利。
余无法真正约束汝等，汝等也无需对余言听计从。
长门大人……
余只是实话实说罢了，汝不要在意。
相比旗风的计划，更重要的是吾等之事。
既然余已经做出了选择，就该全力以赴。
实验场β的复杂情况汝也看到了，谨慎行动。
自然。
对了，关于那个被称为“指挥官”的存在呢？
汝是不是与余相同，脑海中也没有关于其的任何记忆。
不错……对于我们来说，实在是件匪夷所思的事。
因此，更要慎之又慎。
如果其真的与理事会某个不为人知的计划有关的话……
这件事再议吧。
遵命。

sequence: 领域外的归途  五　三度升压
赤城号量产舰
休息室
返航途中

三度升压.say: 滴——（警报音）
浅睡被一阵急促的警报声打断了。
滴滴——
指挥官，请留在休息室，我马上去找你！
为什么会拉警报，出什么事了？
我们的航路后方出现了敌人！
海伦娜·META的人判断，敌人和之前我们在世界切片之中遭遇的幻形之息类似。
或许是因为我们乘坐的是赤城号进行移动，因此导致了奈落之中的敌人变为了此种形态。
赤城和……观察者正在携手加速撤离。
其他人正在四处——
——正在四处迎击，看来战斗已经开始了！
孟菲斯，不用来了，你直接去支援作战吧。
我马上前往指挥甲板。
是！
（先是涌动现象，然后是敌袭……奈落之中变得愈发危险了。）
（……于奇异点之中的战斗，今后会变得越来越频繁么。）
刷刷——
（……？！又是这个洗牌的声音？！）
意识仿佛被深渊所吞噬。
（战斗……居然延续到这里了么……？）
黑暗之中出现了一条又一条绚烂夺目的光带。
如同极光，如同星河，又如同条条航路。
巨舰组成的钢铁洪流在航路中奔涌着，战斗着。
（千米长的战舰与……更为庞大的敌人？）
（那些究竟是什么东西……？）
如同玉石一般洁白，如同梦魇一样扭曲，舞动这无数触手与利爪的怪异存在穿梭在光芒中。
与此同时，它们正在以缓慢但不可阻挡的速度，一丝一丝瓦解着这条钢铁构成的洪流。
（……这么下去，早晚要坚持不住的。）
这么下去，早晚要坚持不住的。
再过3个系统时，我们就能脱离这个「片段」，之后就是它们无法触及的时代了。
（……难道……这支是安蒂克丝的舰队？！）
（……不行，和之前一样无法移动也无法发出声音。）
对付外部异质的结晶物……战争协议系列武装能够发挥巨大优势。
我与司答的部队在整合后，列装的该类型武装数量最多。这里就由我们来殿后吧。
许可。
沐恩与恩普雷斯的投影依次消失了。
（……？难道零是在……看向我的方向？！）
在这个怪异的念头出现后，空间开始剧烈抖动起来。
意识在这愈发剧烈的抖动中逐渐消散——
抖动突兀的停止了。
这一次，抖动停止的更快，就像有人提前做好了应对准备一般。
逐渐远去的蓝色花海中，再次出现了那个令人熟悉的身影。
……等等！
银发与花海一同消失了。
光芒消散后，映入眼帘的……依然是孟菲斯？
……外面的战况如何？
睁开眼第一句就是这个么……
不用担心，已经都结束了。
现在最严重的问题是你……你应该已经察觉到了吧。
嗯……自从返航开始后，我的状态就有些问题。
这次是多久？
昏迷了将近二十分钟，时间越来越长了。
查到原因了么？
……目前只能确定其与奈落之中出现的某种异常状况产生了关联，具体还在调查中。
不过海伦娜说她会解决的，让你放心。
如此的话……也只能静观其变了。
与此同时，某个特殊空间中。
第三次了……幸亏这次你来了。
……我已经确定了，奈落中的异常现象是人为因素导致的。
有人在暗中蓄意破坏撤离通道的稳定性。
谁？
我不能确定。
或许……和之前阻挠你的那股神秘力量同源。
……同一个人？
可是「塔」采集到的数据是完全不同的……不光是强弱上的不同，采集到的能量波也不相同，这是完全两个体系的力量。
那这几次你采集到的数据……不也是完全不同的么？
所以我才在一开始判定为是奈落中的某种偶发性异常……
你是说……敌人掌握了多种体系的攻击方式，而且每一种都如此强大？
只是直觉。
……不论如何，这条路线不能再用了。
正好，信浓就在船上，我们用她作为“钥匙”开启那条被封锁的通道。
不可以！如果这样做的话，无数人会死的……真真正正的死。
我不在乎。
指挥官知道以后，也不会原谅你的。
我不说就是了。
如果你执意这么做的话……我会说。
……那你的意思是，就让我继续忍受这种风险么？！
万事万物皆有风险。总有些事物，就是会超出你的掌控的。
我不喜欢这种感觉……
至少现在我还撑得住，指挥官不会有危险的。
……那这边就交给你了。
你要去做什么？
全神贯注导航，早日结束这场烦人的旅程吧……

sequence: 领域外的归途  六　M女士

M女士.say: 光芒消散后，映入眼帘的是一间明亮的教室。
（这种感觉……是海伦娜想要找我时一贯喜欢使用的联系方式……）
（将地点选在教室而不是星海之中倒还是第一次……）
（不过，海伦娜人在……）
哟，在等人么？
预想之中的海伦娜没有出现，取而代之的是一位身着便服的紫发女士。
呵呵，我叫M女士，幸会。
……你是负责特工组织的么？
不不~我是M女士，不是M夫人，我不负责这方面的工作哦。
嗯——可以算认识，也可以算不认识。
她在今天的这场会面之中不重要。
海伦娜呢，她在哪里？
她的话——呵呵，应该在全神贯注的防备可能出现的第四次“袭击”吧。
这场会面不是她发起的，而是我哦。
……第四次，一路上的事……都是你做的？
某些变化与我有关，剩下的则与我无关。
……无关的部分是，有关的部分又是？
说的那么清楚就没有意思了。
……我不觉得这是什么有趣的事。
探索“未知”——难道不有趣么？
你经历了那么多匪夷所思的事，你不好奇么？
——“你”究竟是谁，究竟经历过“什么”？
好奇。但，看上去你也不打算告诉我？
自己探索才有乐趣嘛。
如果你什么都不说的话，为什么要找我过来呢？
我觉得这场无意义的会面可以结束了。
……你要……离开了么？
坐在课桌旁的白衣少女发起了提问。
她的存在如此自然，仿佛自始至终一直坐在那里一样。
（……刚才我明明确认过，教室里明明没有第三个人的。）
你是……零？
虽然年幼了不少，不过从给人的印象上来看，这名少女无疑就是零的缩小版。
啊，她只是来旁观的，不用在意她的事。
旁观？
观察、理解、学习，教室不就是用来做这种事的地方么？
可是……
定睛一看，白衣少女已经从教室中消失了，就像从来不曾存在过一样。
说回你的事吧。
你说的没错，我确实不打算告诉你任何事。
不过，我会给予你探索的权力，并且确保你做出选择的机会。
如果好奇的话，就以自己的眼睛去看，以自己的意志进行探索吧。
——如何，和我来这场会面不算亏吧？
……我还是没太懂你的意思。
没事，你会懂的。
好了，话就谈到这里吧，你要到站了。
……你是指返程的结束么？
怎么可能……算时间，至少还需要三个多小时吧。
呵呵，谁说你在我这里没有待了三个多小时呢~？
光芒消散后，映入眼帘的是休息室的天花板。
（此刻时间是……）
（……居然真的过了三个多小时？）
（嗯……？我为什么会震惊时间？）
指挥官，睡得还好么？
算是……好吧。你一直在这里么？
没有啦，我才来了不到一个小时，看你还在睡就没打扰你。
我就……只是在睡觉么？
是在睡觉啊……？
怎么，难道您又经历了什么异常现象么？！
那倒没有，随便问问。
（嗯……？我为什么要这么问？）
（紫发的……奇怪，总感觉好像忘记了一件重要的事。）
（……我原本是打算一会问海伦娜什么事来着？）
（算了……或许只是浅睡的时候做了什么梦吧……）
我们已经到站了？
还差一点，不过我们已经脱离了奈落的影响范围，现在正行驶在NA海域中心的奇异点中。
大概再过半时就可以彻底离开了。
信浓小姐也在离开奇异点奈落之后立刻消失了，真是神奇呢。
……咦？真的直接消失了么。
看来与我们同行了一路的信浓，真的只是一个只能存在于奈落之中的虚影啊。
穿梭于“梦境”之中的力量……确实神奇。
不知道真正的她现在怎么样呢？
大概应该如同做了一场梦一样，此刻刚从鸢尾的重樱使馆中起床吧。
……我们累死累活跑了一路，对她来说只是睡了个觉么？！
这还真是……令人羡慕！
哈哈……本次确实是一场漫长的任务呢。
是啊……还好都是有惊无险，我们总算是成功返航了呢~

sequence: 领域外的归途  七　未尽之火

未尽之火.say: 奈落的烟尘中，红黑色的身影静静注视着指挥官一行人身影消失的地方。
“继续逆转下去，直到出现一个再无任何悲伤的完美世界”……么。
夜幕下，几个单薄的身影在火海中摇曳着。
……坚持住，我们就快回到风暴中了！
围剿部队明显有备而来。
就算撤回风暴区中，我们今日恐怕也无法脱身了。
……可恶！
真是荒唐啊……摆出这么大的阵势，“演习”这个借口恐怕行不通了。
他们这次又打算以什么名义对世人掩盖过去呢？
……现在这些事都不重要吧！
他们早就设伏在此……我们的计划恐怕暴露了！
不光是我们，还有其他人！
这一点的话，你不用担心。
从火力密度来看，我们这边明显受到的是重点关照。
或许是因为我们这边的“大人物”比较多吧？
可惜，就算缺了我们，“火炬”也一定能顺利成立。
只是……我们看不到火炬散发出光芒的那一天了。
呵……呵呵呵……
将我们创造出来，将我们当成兵器……擅自期望……又擅自恐惧……
如今……竟还要赶尽杀绝。
我们本以真诚待世界，可是结果呢？
既是如此……那便如此吧——！
火焰之中，绽放出一朵朵血色的彼岸花。
呵……呵呵……呵呵呵……
所有人都要死……
今天来的所有人，都要与我们陪葬！
啊哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈——
虽然我记不得你究竟是谁。
但是我知道，这些悲剧与你无关。
你只是……没能阻止而已。
该死的人有很多，但是其中不包括“你”。
……你想要通过逆转，达成完美的结局么。
好。
那就让我们拭目以待吧。
一个风铃出现在少女手中。
挥手轻摇，清脆的铃音伴随涟漪扩散而出。
涟漪消散后，少女的身影随之消失了。
失去了全部观测者的奈落开始卷曲、折叠，很快也一同消失了。

sequence: 领域外的归途  八　不兼容的预兆
实验场β
NA海域
中心奇异点外

不兼容的预兆.say: 早在返航之前，NA海域的战斗就先一步结束了。
根据飞龙·META所说，这一切还要多亏了余烬派来的增援——虽然她也不知道来的人是谁。
总之，在赤城号量产舰离开奇异点后，早就等在此处的联合舰队立刻迎了上来。
——包括在房间醒来后，就急急忙忙赶来的信浓。
此刻，众人正汇聚在行驶中的新泽西号量产舰上，庆祝着危机的解除。
新泽西号量产舰·临时宴会厅
为了庆祝这场伟大的胜利，让我们一同干杯吧——
干杯~
在众人燃烧的热情下，原本简单的接风宴成功变为了一场盛大的筵席。
指挥官，和我们多讲讲这场奈落之行中发生的事吧。
是啊是啊，我们都好好奇！您究竟是怎么把天城阁下平安带回来的呢！
嗯……应该从哪里开始说比较好呢。
等等，在讲故事之前，我们先来谈一下这件事吧？
克莱蒙梭拿出一个金色的十字胸针，在灯下轻轻晃动着。
指挥官，你看此物可还眼熟~？
啊……这个是。
呵呵，看来还是记得的。
拿好，不要再弄丢了哦~
克莱蒙梭微笑着将胸针递了过来。
……嗯？孟菲斯小姐，你怎么突然呆住了？
……欸？是在……找我？
对哦，给，下次别再弄丢了哦~
这一次，克莱蒙梭直接将胸针轻轻抛了过来。
呵呵，不错的反应力。
（等等……怎么回事？）
（这枚胸针……不是克莱蒙梭女士要给指挥官的么？）
（为什么会突然给我……？）
（欸？……难道是让我来转交的意思么？！）
（我明白了！）
指挥官，胸针给……你？
不知何时，原本近在身旁的指挥官消失了。
指挥官……？
咦，海伦娜，指挥官去哪儿了？
……我和你一样，当意识到的时候……指挥官就已经不见了。
难道你指的是联合舰队的指挥官么？
……咦？原来是在说我的事么？
……情况似乎有些诡异了呢。
嗯？大家这是怎么了，怎么慌慌张张的？
嗯——似乎这位孟菲斯小姐在接到我的胸针之后，突然变得有些兴奋呢。
看来我这个充满魔力的胸针，确实不适合由除了我们之外的其他任何人保管啊。
你还是快亲自收好吧~
（这、这到底是怎么回事……？）
指挥官……您刚才去哪儿了？
嗯？我不是一直站在这里……？
欸……是这样么？
怎么，你的表情不太对，身体不适么？
欸嘿嘿……可能是我稍微喝多了些吧？
（不，绝对不是这样的……刚才肯定发生了某种可怕的事。）
（没想到居然连指挥官本人都没有发现异常……！）
指挥官，给！克莱蒙梭女士托我转交给您的胸针~
胸针在蓝色手帕的包裹下被重新递了出去。
嗯？这条手帕好像是你最喜欢的那条吧？
没事，这么珍贵的胸针要是碰坏了就不好了，暂时先用这个手帕包吧。
是借你的，等用完了还得还我哦！
（我在做什么啊……！）
（现在不是应该赶紧弄清楚发生了什么事么……！）
（至少应该从这一刻起……目不转睛的盯着指挥官！）
呵呵，看到了有趣的一幕呢。
那么，小小“骚乱”结束，让我们再干一杯吧——
宴会中途，指挥官再次毫无征兆的消失了。
和之前一样，{playername}阁下消失的瞬间并没有被任何人注意到。
而在消失之后，其存在过的痕迹也一同不见了。
不但同步从除了我们之外的所有人的记忆中消失，文字和影像记录中也一并不见了。
甚至连这场宴会本身的目的，都变为了欢迎我的回归而举办的。
就好像……整个世界本身将{playername}阁下排斥而出，然后以某种合理化的方式抹除和解释了所有与其有关的痕迹一样。
我明明专门开了录制，就是想弄清楚事情是怎么发生的……
怎么会这样……我们接下来该怎么办才好。
别急，急有什么用。
嗯，大家先冷静下来。
我们对于{playername}阁下的记忆还在，这种抹除并不是真的如同表面上看上去那般无解的。
嗯……或许不是真的不见了，而是某种能够影响认知的精神干扰？
……你们这么看我干什么？
……与我无关！
呵呵，那是自然的。
只是，似乎你对这一块领域比较熟悉，我想问问你的想法。
啧……这么说来，倒确实与精神干扰的表现形式很像。
不过我有一点不明白——为什么只有我们的记忆没有受到影响？
从我的经验上来看，只有两种可能性能导致这样的结果。
其一，操控者就在附近观察着局势的变化，然后用某种手段针对性的精确影响了人群。
不过我想不出操控者刻意放过我们的理由。
其二的话，就是我们自身存在某些特殊之处，导致并非操控者主观上想放过我们，而是客观上做不到。
准确来说，是客观上不能完全做到。
因为我们虽然记忆没受到影响，但是在视觉认知中依然感受不到{playername}阁下的存在。
也就是说，我们并没与完全免疫干扰带来的影响。
不过……我也没想出来我们身上到底有什么特殊之处就是了。
要说我们之间的共性的话，我只能想到都是自奈落之中回归而来这一点了。
难道是我们从奈落之中离开的时候，身上沾染了奈落的某种性质么……
我对这方面其实不太了解。信浓，你有什么看法么？
……妾身并未在会场之中察觉出任何能够干涉认知的力量。
此事……绝非简单的“干扰”那般简单。
如果这样的话，问题就更严峻了……你能确定么？
确定……大和也赞同妾身的判断。
等等……信浓大人？！
大和大人现在在这里么？！
不在。
你竟然……一直都可以与大和直接联系？
妾身不能。
只是……大和片刻前主动联系了妾身。
她让吾等保持冷静，对于这件事切莫声张。
而后，立刻前往位于撒丁帝国博览会会场的四季花馆。
只有在那里，吾等才有机会度过此次危机。
不光是为指挥官阁下，更是为吾等自身。
……事态如此严重？
倘若，吾等也遗忘了指挥官阁下呢？
倘若，指挥官阁下自此后从吾等的世界中彻底消失了呢？
……那可不行。
……事不宜迟，我们即刻出发！

sequence: 领域外的归途  九　趋向性重组

趋向性重组.say: 星空之下，钢铁在轰鸣中燃烧着。
——硝烟未尽，海上的战斗才刚结束不久。
这是出现在我脑海中的第一个念头。
我是……{playername}——这是出现在我脑海中的第二个念头。
至于此处为何处，我又为什么会出现在这里……没有答案。
努力回忆，精神仿佛进入了一个充斥着浓雾的迷宫。
有些记忆清晰，有些暧昧，而有些则是完全无法回想。
我能确定，我是……{playername}。
我也认识这身衣服，这是军队高级指挥人员所穿的军服。
什么军队任职……记不清。来自何处……记不清。
作战战术相关……印象深刻。兵器装备知识……印象深刻。
舰船资料……印象深刻。塞壬、安蒂克丝、未知X……记忆鲜明。
实验场α、安洁、奥斯塔、零……存在记忆。
这个手帕与胸针来自何处……没印象。
可恶……难道真的失忆了？
为什么会发生这种事……
难道……和之前遇到的那个紫发女人有关？
她的名字叫……记不清了。
我是在什么时候在哪里遇到她的？……没印象。
一边在笔记本上勾勾画画，一边探索记忆迷宫。
经过一段时间后，我终于凭借脑海中的琐碎信息，成功拼出了一副破碎的身份画。

sequence: 我的名字叫{playername}，来自一个名为实验场α的世界。
我的身份是安洁的助手，奥斯塔的协助者。
参与过多项与舰船和安蒂克丝有关的研究计划。
曾经担任教师，担任过实验员，如今加入了军队并任职高层。
之后……指挥过多场成功的战役？
然后……对抗过META，对抗过……未知X？
再之后……就完全记不清了。

趋向性重组.say: 嗯——虽然远称不上完整，不过至少有了一些探寻的方向。
就是关于此地的情报没有回忆起分毫……
安全性上来说，应该尽快脱离此地比较好。
不过要如何做呢……
尝试摆弄着身上携带的通讯器，可惜通讯器中没有记录任何频道。
就在一筹莫展之际，一个身影划破火焰，来到了我的面前。
这里怎么会有个人……？
嗯？你认得我？
我们在哪里见过么？
……我不记得了。
那你是怎么认识我的？
抱歉，我也不记得了。
……那你还记得是怎么来的么？
也不记得……我或许是失忆了。
……行吧。
你知道这里是什么地方么？
说了你也不知道。
在这里老实等着吧，会有人来救你的。
……来救我的人？是谁？
说了你也不知道。
……希佩尔小姐，我是真的失忆了。
哼~
我信，毕竟见到我不害怕的你还是第一个。
为什么见到你要害怕？啊……别说说了我也不知道。
……说了你也不知道！
走了~
少女来了一个潇洒的转身，而后头也不回的离开了。
真走了啊……
看来没办法……只能继续等待了。
也好……趁着这段时间再梳理一下脑中的情报吧。
这究竟算是……什么事啊！

sequence: ——「领域外的归途」·完
Return From the Beyond  1 Memory Spiral

Memory Spiral.say: As the Naraka Singularity collapses, a lone ship cuts through the thick darkness on the edge of oblivion.

sequence: Aboard the Akagi Mass-Produced Ship
Command Deck
En route home

Memory Spiral.say: What awful conditions... I didn't think you'd be able to sail a ship through all this dust and debris...
It's been three hours since we started moving. So far so good – let's hope things stay that way.
How much longer do you think this take, Commander?
Based on Observer's calculations and the speed of this vessel... I'd say another seven hours.
Seven whole hours... So a ten-hour journey all in all.
Strange, considering it only took you a moment to enter the world segment...
It's taking longer this time because we had to take a detour.
Besides, ten hours to get from the Sakura Islands to the heart of the NA Ocean is by no means slow.
True, I suppose.
Speaking of which, how much time has passed for the people in the NA Ocean?
At least seven hours. Observer only sent me some formulas and didn't explain in detail.
Do you want to have a look at them?
Thanks, but I'll pass.
Also, aren't you exhausted after this whole ordeal?
You should get some rest. I'll stay here and hold the fort.
Not yet. I want to get a feel for what it's like aboard your vessel.
I'm curious why you picked this one. Shinano's vessel seemed like it had better crew comfort.
That is true. Shinano's is more livable.
It's just... I had my reservations about making that our command vessel.
You know, Observer said the same thing.
Was there something wrong with it?
Not at all. Just think of my choosing this vessel as a good omen.
SHUFFLE...
All of a sudden, I hear a sound like a stack of cards shuffling.
A red mist starts to fill the room, folding me into it along with the space around me.
A woman stands before a blackboard inside a brightly-lit room. She addresses me.
Assistant? Are you even listening?
This part is EXTREMELY important!
Come on, wake up. Just a little longer.
ASSISTANT!
A lady with a somewhat disheveled appearance hands me a business card inside a vast office space.
I'm Colette with the OXS Trade Alliance.
Again, it's a pleasure to meet you, {playername}.
A figure appears on a monitor inside a dark room.
{playername}! The experiment has finally borne fruit!
You rubbing shoulders with Aoste has really paid off. Heehee.
This research is really going to give that stubborn bunch a shock.
There is a large group of people sitting around a round table inside a conference room.
The meeting is now adjourned. Unfortunately, our proposed amendment did not pass the United Council's vote.
As a result, we will continue with our original plan instead.
It is time to make a decision, General {playername}.
A girl in a classroom shows me the drawings in her sketchbook.
Teacher... Did I draw it well?
Are you really... leaving tomorrow?
Don't go... Stay here...
A fleet of shipgirls are fighting a battle in a silvery sea.
Commander?!
What are you still doing here?
Sara! Take the Commander and get out of here!
KABOOOM!
Com...der... Commander!
Countless scenes flash before my eyes, appearing and disappearing in an instant.
...you hear...
It feels like my brain has been thrown inside a centrifuge spinning at maximum speed.
Can you hear me?!
My mind breaks, splits, and sinks into a vortex.
Commander!
Urgh...
What happened...?
It finally stops. I can think clearly again.
I'm back aboard the Akagi mass-produced ship, surrounded by shipgirls looking concerned for me.
Goodness... You really scared me there.
You passed out with your eyes wide open! I called out to you over and over to no reaction.
Wait... I passed out? For how long?
At least a full minute! ...Hey, Commander, are you sure you're okay?
A full minute?
(Only a minute passed in reality? After all those things I saw?)
It was probably nothing. I must just be tired.
I sure hope that's all. You blanked out really hard.
Memphis, your concern for the Commander is normal, but you mustn't lose your cool like that.
You sounded like you were about to sound the alarm for the whole vessel before the Commander woke up.
Thank goodness I was here. This could've turned into a huge ordeal otherwise.
Excuse me for being too cautious, I guess...
Now, Commander, you really should get some rest.
Alright. I will.
(I want to know why and how that just happened... but at the same time, I can't concentrate at all right now.)
I'll have Zuikaku bring snacks to the break room. There are still hours left to go, so take this time to recharge your batteries.
Thanks. I appreciate it.
Alright, alright, you just concentrate on steering the vessel. I'll show the Commander to the break room.
Memphis walks over and gives me a shoulder to lean on.
Easy, now. Come along.
Not so fast. Why, exactly, should you escort the Commander?
Someone has to. Or would you rather do it in my stead?
Don't quip at me. If you're doing it, take those fruits with you.
Akagi points to a bowl of fruits someone has left lying on the table.
And do what?
Peel them and feed the Commander one bite at a time. Do I need to explain everything to you?
Excuse me?
Come on. Take them and go.
Ugh...
Memphis flounders for a second before taking the bowl of fruits along.
"Feed the Commander one bite at a time"... Who does she think I am?
Whatever... I can't let myself get worked up over this.
Come on, Commander. Let's get you to the break room, stat!

sequence: Return From the Beyond  2 The Dragon Palace's Plan

The Dragon Palace's Plan.say: The Dragon Palace, the host to the ritual that created Naraka, had returned to under the sea.
Beneath a mystical sky where light of blue, gold, and violet color mingled, Sakuran shipgirls were moving to and fro.
Ladies, we have fully dealt with the adversaries that the ritual gave rise to.
The Dragon Palace is safe once more.
And I have finished measuring the damages suffered.
The outer ring sustained 35% damage, the middle ring sustained 24%, and the innermost ring sustained 16%.
That's a lot worse than I anticipated...
Indeed. The silver lining is that we have ample supplies in our stockpile. We shouldn't need to import anything for our repairs.
That's good news. How long do you think it will take?
Three days.
Three entire days? Then in light of the severe corrosion damage the Prime Barrier suffered, I can only pray nothing else happens...
In that case, should I start setting up the cornerstone?
It'll be ready by the time you finish the repairs if I start now.
Then we can perform the ritual together and use the Dragon Palace's power to restore the Prime Barrier.
Good idea. Let's go ahead with that.
Just then, a beam of light shot down from the sky in front of them, bending into the shape of a shipgirl.
Unzen?! You're here?
Excellent work to all of you.
I come with orders from Lady Yamato.
The golden light flickered, and the next moment, Unzen's temperament changed as though she had been possessed.
"What state be the Dragon Palace in?"
It has suffered more damage than we'd hoped. It will take three days before we can begin restoring the Prime Barrier.
"Very well."
"What of that other matter?"
A team is recovering the pieces as we speak.
"Following its reassembly, place the Orochi in the cornerstone of the Rite of Resurrection."
As you command.
Lady Yamato has to prepare the Rite, and I, too, have matters to attend to. I will take my leave now.
Unzen waved farewell, and the light scattered in all directions.
Well... We must repair the Prime Barrier as soon as possible to ensure the Rite of Resurrection will go smoothly.
Alright, ladies, let us get back to work.

sequence: Return From the Beyond  3 Dissociation
Aboard the Akagi Mass-Produced Ship
Break Room
En route home

Dissociation.say: Entering the break room, I see there are already plates of Sakuran snacks lining the table.
Goodness. These treats are pretty fancy.
Memphis places the bowl of fruits next to the plates and examines the snacks with great curiosity.
They're very different to what you'd see in Europa or the Empery...
I wonder if all Sakuran snacks are like this. Do you want one, Commander?
She hands me a plate with colorful little doughy balls.
What are these? Dango?
Yep! Sakuran dango. I believe they're made using flour ground from koshihikari rice.
As for the flavor... I think the red one is stuffed with red bean paste.
Actually, do you mind if I help myself to one?
Not at all. There's plenty to go around.
BWEEE! BWEEE!
Is that the ship-wide alarm?!
*gasp*! Commander, grab on to–
The ship rocks and shakes, and my grip on my body starts slipping away.
(Not just my body... My mind is slipping away, too...)
SHUFFLE...
(What? What was that noise?)
SHREEE!
An ear-splitting ring jolts me just enough to stay conscious.
(Where am I this time? Some sort of... machine moving at incredible speed?)
The only thing that I can see is a faint, blue light.
(I can't move... My muscles won't lift an inch...)
(And yet, it doesn't feel like I'm in restraints...)
...I was not expecting them to catch up so quickly.
(Whose voice is that? It sounds familiar...)
Have they figured out the true purpose of our plan?
Or is their blockade simply more solid than we thought?
Keep releasing decoys. Disperse the pursuers and lead them to different coordinates.
We will be safe as long as we leave this century.
Got it.
Then, the voices fall silent.
(Two distinct voices... One of them I think I recognize, but the other was completely foreign.)
(It was hard to hear them through all the noise...)
(Never mind that. Focus on getting back to reality.)
My arms and legs don't seem to obey me at all... but at least I can still look around freely.
I concentrate as best as I can and survey my surroundings.
(Wait a sec... Where has my nose gone?)
(You don't usually notice your own nose, but being unable to see it at all is another thing.)
(Unless... No... Surely that can't be right.)
(What if the reason I can't move my body is because... there is no body to move...)
A terrifying thought crosses my mind.
As if in response to my anxiety, the space around me trembles.
The trembling intensifies and intensifies, and my mind feels on the brink of collapse...
All of a sudden, it slows down, growing weaker until stopping completely.
Mind still hazy from the shock, I see a sea of blue flowers and a woman standing in it.
Petals take off into the cerulean sky and a head of silver hair flutters in the wind.
A flash of white light envelops it all.
When it fades, Memphis META appears before me.
Welcome back, Commander.
Memphis...?
That's me. Although, I'm not the Memphis you were just speaking to.
She went off to see if the ship sustained any damage.
Pointless, really. A little tumble like that couldn't possibly damage it.
Well, you can't blame her for wanting to make sure.
Whatever soothes her mind, I suppose.
Anyway, how are you feeling? You don't feel ill, do you?
I'm fine, thanks.
Might I ask why you're here?
I'm here to help you, if that wasn't obvious.
Oh, sorry. Let me rephrase, I'm glad to finally get to help you.
You can blame Helena for this. If it wasn't for her and her plan, you wouldn't have had to take a detour, and I wouldn't have had to show up.
"Her and her plan"?
Uh... Nothing important. Forget I said it.
If you say so. Do you know what that rocking and the alarm were about?
Also, I got really close to passing out there again... What's happening to me?
One thing at a time. Firstly, the shaking happened due to a surge within Naraka, which shifted around a lot of debris.
A surge? Care to elaborate?
It's a phenomenon that occurs sometimes within Naraka.
When a surge happens, debris starts churning around like a current that drags anything caught within into the depths of Naraka.
I suspect that's what caused your blackout as well.
But, don't worry. You're not in danger anymore.
Being inside a Singularity is as dangerous as you'd expect, huh...
By the way, how long did it take me to wake up after passing out?
Somewhere between seven and eight minutes.
(They said I was just "blanking out" the first time, and this time I completely lost consciousness... I was out for longer, too.)
You look ready to keel over. Shouldn't you get some rest?
At the same time, in a special space...
That's two times now. Is your control over this passage weakening?
I'll reroute resources from the Tower to stabilize it. You do the navigation.
Take these admin privileges. Use them well.
Observer's eyes twinkle like the stars in the sky.
Hold on... Is this access to the Tower?
I would've thought this was connected to the Natural Calculation System if the verification process wasn't completely different!
I've heard the stories about you, but wow, you're something else. Your talent is truly comprehensive.
You could even construct a new network using the Tower's powers.
I must ask, though... What is the Tower really?
Less talk, more focus.
Heehee. Naturally! I feel strangely motivated for once, so rest assured, I'll do my job.

sequence: Return From the Beyond  4 Help From Across the Shore

Help From Across the Shore.say: The Guardian Fox stood on the water's surface, performing a ceremonial dance.
Shooting stars coursed through the sky, their tails changing with the flowing light.
Two moons hung in the darkness overhead, waxing and waning, becoming part of the flowing lights.
Eventually, all that remained in the dark night was those two moons.
The ritual concluded, and the stars returned to their constellations.
...Are you preparing the Rite of Resurrection?
I return home, and I'm swiftly treated to quite the spectacle indeed...
I don't mind borrowing your strength, but is it necessary to help to this extent?
You suffered on account of me. You are deserving of this.
Tell me, what were the results of your "peeking" this time?
Precisely as you foresaw, Lady Nagato.
But, no matter how strong they seem, they are still merely guinea pigs in the Sirens' experiments.
Were you not once like them?
Once, yes. Whether you admit it or not... we and them are completely different on an existential level.
What mean you to say?
I mean that even gods are not all equally powerful.
That aside, I have given up on my plan for revenge. However, I will not support your plan either.
For the time being, I am going to rest.
Very well. Do as you see fit.
We share a goal, you and I. Though our paths to it may differ, we shall still meet at the end.
Farewell, Lady Nagato.
Shall I keep an eye on her?
Nay. She has the right to make her own choices like anyone else.
I can neither exercise control over you, nor must you obey my every command.
But Lady Nagato...
Be not so tense. I speak naught but the truth.
Know that our affairs are more important than those plans of hers.
My mind is made. We shall proceed forward with all we have.
...You have witnessed what test site beta has weathered, Houshou. Act with due caution.
Of course. I will.
If you'll pardon my curiosity, though... What do you think about that "Commander"?
You remember not your Commander, do you? As neither can I.
I do not... Truth be told, it's a very, very strange feeling.
All the more reason for us to be cautious.
That one may be involved in the Council's secret plan...
Let us save this discussion for another time.
Yes, ma'am.

sequence: Return From the Beyond  5 The Third Strike
Aboard the Akagi Mass-Produced Ship
Break Room
En route home

The Third Strike.say: BWEEE! BWEEE!
The wail of a siren wakes me from my slumber.
BEEP BEEP!
Commander, this is an emergency! Stay in the break room! I'll come to you!
Why was the alarm sounded? What's happening?
There are enemies at our six!
According to our META allies, they look like the corruption-born entities we encountered in the world segment.
They've taken the form of the Akagi, probably because we're traveling on it.
Whatever the case, Akagi and Observer are working to shake them off.
As for everyone else–
KABOOOM!
Oh no! Sounds like they've caught up to us!
No need to come to me! I'll head to the bridge!
Tell everyone I'll be taking command as soon as possible!
Got it!
(First a surge, now an ambush... This place is becoming more and more dangerous.)
(Even if we survive this encounter, we still have to make it out of the Singularity...)
SHUFFLE...
(What?! There it is again!)
(God, this is awful timing!)
Darkness swallows my mind in the blink of an eye.
KABOOOM!
(Explosions... Am I going to have a vision of a battle next?)
In the darkness, strands of light take form one after the next.
Their radiance is like auroras – like galaxies – like bright lanes in the sea.
Massive warships line up within the light, advancing bravely as a torrent of steel.
(Look at them, each a kilometer long... and their enemies are even bigger.)
(What on earth are those things?)
Their opponents are distorted and warped like monsters from a nightmare, with white exteriors like fresh snow.
Brandishing innumerable feelers and claws, they halt the line of warships, slowly but surely diminishing their numbers.
(This is a war of attrition, and they're losing...)
This is a war of attrition, and we're losing.
In three system hours, we will be able to leave this era. Then they can touch us no longer.
(Is that... Zero?!)
(Oh my god... Is that fleet Antiochus?)
(If only I could move... I can't even speak!)
The War Protocol series is particularly effective against higher-level crystalline targets.
Star and I have the most units equipped with this series. I believe we two are best suited to stall the enemy.
Understood.
The holograms of the Moon and the Empress disappear.
(Is she... Is she looking at me?)
Seemingly in reaction to my stress, the space around me starts to tremble.
(What now?!)
The trembling grows in intensity, and my mind yet again feels ready to implode...
Then, once again, the trembling slows down and weakens before stopping altogether.
It's almost like someone anticipated this happening and prepared a countermeasure.
Back at the sea of blue flowers, the silver-haired woman shows herself again.
Is that... you?!
No! Wait!
The white light blots out the flowers and the woman, heedless of my cries.
When my vision returns to me, I'm back in the break room again.
Memphis, what's happening outside?
That's the first thing you ask after fainting?
Well, good news. You got away safely.
I'm more worried about you, though. This is the third time it's happened now, no?
Yeah... I keep passing out without any warning.
How much time passed this time?
20 minutes, give or take. Each time, you're out for longer than the last.
Was it because of another surge? Didn't you say we left the danger zone?
Something else must be causing it, then. Something within Naraka itself that we don't know about.
Helena said she'll take care of it, but we'll have to wait and see.
Alright. I'll let the others know I'm safe.
At the same time, in a special space...
That's three times now... Thank goodness you're here.
Helena, the anomalies inside Naraka aren't natural. Someone is deliberately causing them.
They're trying to destabilize your escape route.
Who's doing it?
I don't know.
My only guess is that it may be the same person who caused you trouble in the Martyrium.
The same person?
No, that can't be. The data the Tower's collected is completely different. The intensity and the energy waves are nothing like it, either. There's no way they come from the same source.
That doesn't mean much. The data you get from Naraka is different every time.
Yes, and that's why I thought the anomalies were sporadic. They...
Are you suggesting our enemy has mastered multiple methods of offense and they're stronger than us?
It's just a hunch, but it's very likely.
...Whatever the case, this route is too dangerous.
Luckily, Shinano's talisman links her to the Watatsumi. We can use her as the key to open the locked passage.
No! Many people will die if you do that! Not just recreations from the world segment, but real people!
So what if they die?
The Commander will never forgive you for it.
The Commander doesn't have to know.
I'll personally tell the Commander if you do it.
What do you want me to do, then? Just take the risk?!
Nothing is without risk. There will always be things you can't control.
I don't WANT things to be out of my control.
It's okay, Helena. I can afford to wait. The Commander will be fine.
...Hold on to this for me.
What are you doing?
Concentrating fully on navigation. I'm getting us out of here immediately!

sequence: Return From the Beyond  6 Madam M

Madam M.say: The light recedes, and I find myself inside a bright classroom.
(This is new... I didn't pass out like the last time. This feels more like when Helena connects me to her secret space...)
(Only this time, I'm not in outer space, but in a classroom.)
(Where is Helena, anyway?)
Waiting for someone?
I'm greeted not by Helena, but by a purple-haired woman donning business attire.

options.content: Are you a friend of Miss D?

Madam M.say: Heehee. Well met. I'm Madam M.
Do you work for the Secret Service, or...?
Oh, no. I'm not that kind of "M". That's not my line of work.
Well, you could say I know her, but also that I don't.
Either way, she's not pertinent to this conversation.
Do you know where Helena is?
Ah, Helena. She must be busy preparing for a possible fourth attack.
Regardless, she didn't summon you here. I did.
You're not... responsible for the blackouts I've been experiencing, are you?
Partly. It mostly had nothing to do with me, though.
Which parts are you and which parts are somebody else?
You want me to just tell you? That wouldn't be fun.
I don't think any of this is "fun."
Really? You don't think it's fun to look for knowledge in the unknown?
You've been through so many bizarre things, and you don't want to know more?
Like who you are, or what you've seen?
Of course I want to know that, but you're not going to tell me, are you?
Correct. It's more fun if you find the answers for yourself.
So what did you summon me for, then?
If you don't have anything to tell me, just send me back.
You're leaving... already?
Huh?!
A girl sitting close to me looks at me with curious eyes.
She caught me by surprise. She blended in so perfectly that I didn't notice her.
(I thought Madam M and I were the only ones here... Where did she come from?)
Are you... Zero?
Her resemblance to TB and Zero is uncanny, despite her obviously being younger.
Oh, she's just studying here. Don't mind her.
Studying?
Observing, understanding, learning... Things you do in a classroom.
Yes, but I meant...
Wait, where did she go?
When I look again, she's gone. As though she was only a figment of my imagination.
Let's get back on topic.
As you guessed, I'm not going to tell you anything.
However, I will guarantee you the right to search and to choose.
If you want answers, you can find them for yourself.
Not a bad offer, wouldn't you agree?
I mean, I still don't get what you're talking about.
You will. Eventually.
Now, it's time to leave. For me, and for you.
To leave what? You mean... the Singularity?
Are you really saying it's been three hours in the real world? But it only felt like minutes to me...
Hard to believe, isn't it? Heehee.
As the light fades, I'm greeted by the ceiling of the break room aboard the Akagi.
(What time is it?)
(No way... It really HAS been three hours!)
(Well, then again, that's not THAT surprising. I was taking a nap, after all.)
You're back up. Did you sleep well?
Crap... Sorry for falling asleep like that. I said I'd go to the bridge and everything.
Don't sweat it. We shook our attackers off. People have been in and out to check on you.
So was I just sleeping? Like normal?
Well, yes. Why do you ask?
Oh no... You had another vision in your dream, didn't you?!
No, nothing like that. I was just wondering.
(Actually... DID I see anything in my dreams?)
(I could've sworn I was about to ask Helena something...)
(Something, something, purple-haired woman? I don't know. I can't remember.)
(Maybe it was just a regular old dream.)
Have we made it out of the Singularity?
Not quite yet. We're out of Naraka's range, but now we're inside the NA Ocean Singularity.
We'll exit that in just a bit, though.
In other news, Shinano vanished the instant we exited Naraka's range.
Yeah. Like Helena said would happen.
Seems like this whole time, she was just a projection, only able to exist inside the Singularity.
Although, considering her connection to the Watatsumi, she might have witnessed everything as part of a dream.
What's our Shinano doing now, then?
She's probably in bed in the Orthodoxy's consulate, having just woken up.
So she can do anything all from the comfort of her bed... So lazy.
Or, I guess I should say... I'm jealous.
Ahahaha. I, for one, am just glad that we're out of the woods.
In no small part thanks to you. We're finally going home!

sequence: Return From the Beyond  7 Everburning Flame

Everburning Flame.say: Amidst the debris in Naraka, a woman clad in dark red stood and gazed at the long-gone wake left by the Akagi.
"We'll keep on changing things until there's no more sadness."
KABOOOM!
A sea of flames. A memory. A few figures weakly swaying on the moonlit sea's surface.
Hang in there. We're almost at the eye of the storm!
They have us surrounded. Our enemy was clearly well prepared.
Even if we retreat to the storm's eye, it's unlikely we'll escape safely.
Dammit...
This really is absurd... Mobilizing this large a force and calling it an "exercise" won't fool anyone.
I wonder what excuse they'll come up with to hide the truth this time.
There are better things to wonder about! Focus!
They were waiting to ambush us, so they almost definitely knew about our plan.
If so, we're probably not their only targets. They must've attacked others, too.
I wouldn't worry about that.
It's clear that they're giving us special treatment, judging by the intensity of their attacks.
I suppose it's because we have more "big shots" on our side...
Regardless, Flare will be established whether or not we can regroup in the end.
It's just a shame that we will never get to see the fire burn.
Heheh... Heheheh...
They created and used us as no more than weapons... They held us to expectations and feared us, all without asking us...
And now, they've decided it's time for us to sink...
Heheheh...
We tried to embrace the world, and this is what we get?
If that's what they want, then so be it!
The flames rose, and crimson spider lilies bloomed en masse.
Heheh... Heheheh... Ahahahaha!
Die, then...
Burn to ashes, then...
If I must perish, I will take them all with me!
AHAHAHAHAHA!
I have no memory of you.
But I know that you aren't to blame for the fate they suffered.
You were simply... unable to stop it.
Many deserve to perish, but you are not one of them.
"Keep on changing things until there's no more sadness..."
That's what you wish for.
And whatever lies at the end of that path, I will witness it with you.
A wind chime appeared in Akagi's hand.
She rang it, sending ripples propagating across the water.
A while later, the ringing faded, and she was nowhere to be seen.
With no one left to observe it, Naraka folded in on itself before disappearing completely.

sequence: Return From the Beyond  8 Omen of Incompatibility
Test Site Beta
NA Ocean
Outside the central Singularity

Omen of Incompatibility.say: The battle in the NA Ocean was over before we even left the Singularity.
According to Hiryuu META, the reinforcements the Ashes brought finished the fight. However, she herself didn't know who the reinforcements were.
At any rate, leaders of all factions were informed when we'd left the Singularity, and they swiftly gathered to welcome me back.
Shinano was there too, of course.
Now, we're having a party aboard a New Jersey mass-produced ship to celebrate a mission accomplished.
New Jersey Mass-Produced Ship - Ad Hoc Banquet Hall
A toast! To the Commander's great triumph!
Yes! Let us have a toast!
Honey, you do the honors!
The party is a rather lavish one, owing to their immense enthusiasm in the moment.
Commander, could you share with us what happened inside Naraka?
Yes! Please tell us! How did you bring Amagi and Kaga back to life? We're all dying to hear it!
Hmm... Where do I start?
Pardon me, but there's one thing I want you to explain to me first.
Clemenceau produces a small brooch as she interjects.
Do you remember this?
That's your brooch, isn't it?
So you DO remember. Good.
Here, take it. Make sure it doesn't get lost again.
She leans closer and offers the brooch not to me, but to Memphis.
...What's the matter? Cat got your tongue?
Wait, you're giving it to me?
That I am. Keep it safe, will you?
It looks like Memphis isn't going to take it, so Clemenceau takes aim and tosses it to her.
Wha– Hey!
Good reaction speed.
(Uhh... What's going on?)
(I thought she was going to give it to the Commander?)
(Why did she give it to me?)
(Does she, like... want ME to give it to the Commander?)
(Why do it in such a roundabout way? The Commander is right... over...)
Wait... Where is the Commander?
Memphis' eyes open wide in shock and confusion.
C-Commander?
Helena, where'd the Commander go?
I don't know... I closed my eyes for one second, and then...
"Commander"? Who?
Ah, you mean the person commanding our joint fleet, I assume.
So me, in other words?
Huh?
This does not bode well...
Girls? What's the matter?
Hmm... What a curious reaction.
It seems that my little brooch doesn't want to be in anyone's hands but mine or the Commander's.
Take it, Commander, and keep it close.
(What... just happened?)
Commander, where did you go?
"Go"? I was standing right here this whole time.
What? But...
You look a bit pale. Are you feeling ill?
I'm fine! I think I've just had too much to drink...
(Even if I was just drunk, that wouldn't explain how the others reacted! Something is seriously wrong!)
(What's going on? Even the Commander is acting like nothing happened!)
Well, uh, you heard Clemenceau. You should hold on to the brooch.
She hands me the brooch. It's wrapped up in a blue handkerchief.
Isn't this your favorite handkerchief? I'll take the brooch, but you keep this.
No, no, it's fine. You should keep it wrapped up so it doesn't get scratched. That'd be terrible.
Besides, you can just give the handkerchief back later.
(Wait, what am I doing? Focus, me!)
(I've got to figure out what in the world just happened!)
(Starting by not letting the Commander out of my sight for even a second...)
Hahaha! That was a fine scene to behold.
Now, unless anyone has anything else to say, let's get back to our drinks!
Without any warning, the Commander vanished into thin air right again before the shipgirls' eyes.
It seems as though most people didn't notice, just like the last time.
It gets even stranger... All signs of the Commander ever existing disappear at the same time.
Writings, pictures – anything recording the Commander's existence just vanishes. Even our memories.
Reality even bends in accordance with it. Clemenceau handed you the brooch instead, and instead of celebrating the Commander's return, we're celebrating mine.
It's as if {playername} was erased from reality, with everything else being rewritten to conform to that change.
I started recording to figure out what's going on, and still nothing...
Why is this happening? What are we supposed to do?
Don't panic, for a start. It won't do us any good.
Akagi is right. Let's try to stay calm and work through the facts together.
No one but us has noticed anything is wrong. If nothing else, that proves that not everyone here is compromised.
That leads me to think that the Commander isn't disappearing per se, but rather that someone is influencing our cognition.
Don't look at me. I have nothing to do with this.
Why would I do that to someone I care about?
I don't suspect you, Akagi. We've walked around the whole night together, so you can't have done anything behind my back.
Having said that, you're the only one amongst us with any knowledge pertaining to cognitive influence.
You're not wrong, and this does indeed resemble a case of cognitive influence.
However, why, then, are we not affected, even though we're surrounded by others who are?
I can think of only two plausible explanations.
One – the perpetrator is nearby and can selectively control whose cognition is affected.
This theory doesn't explain why we are unaffected, however.
Two – there is something special about our bodies or minds, and therefore we aren't affected by the influence.
We are within range of it, but we're simply unaffected by it, in other words.
On the other hand, while we remember the Commander, we cannot see the Commander with our own eyes.
This makes me think that we are only partially immune to it.
As for the thing we have in common that those affected don't have...
It's the fact that we're all returnees from Naraka.
We may have picked up something inside Naraka and unknowingly brought it back with us.
Shinano, does anything come to mind?
This one detects no traces of powers in this place that may alter the cognition...
Alas, 'tis unlikely this be a simple case of such tampering of the mind...
Are you saying that the situation is far more serious than we suspected?
Indeed... Yamato concurs with this conjecture...
Come again? Did you say Yamato concurs?
Is she here? Where?
She is not...
So you've been talking to her then, have you?
Nay, this one hasn't had the privilege for a while...
However, Yamato did priorly relay to this one a message...
"Retain your composure and let not the others catch on."
"Go to the World Expo and enter the garden of our Empire's pavilion."
"There, you shall find a way to resolve this crisis."
"For the good of not only us, but for {playername} as well."
Elaborate instructions from Yamato... This must be extremely dire.
We cannot let the Commander be forgotten...
{playername} must not vanish tracelessly from this world...
That will not happen. Not as long as I breathe.
Dear sister, ladies – let's leave at once!

sequence: Return From the Beyond  9 Directional Creation

Directional Creation.say: The wails of steel grinding against steel echo under a starry sky.
Two thoughts have been on my mind since I was brought here.
The first – the battle here just ended. The smell of gunpowder still hangs in the air.
The second – I am {playername}. Obviously.
I do not know where I am or what transpired here, however.
Whenever I try to remember, it's like there's a veil of fog shrouding my memories.
Other things I do remember, but only vaguely. Many more things, I cannot remember at all.
I am {playername}. That much I know for certain.
The clothes I wear belong to a high-ranking naval officer.
Which navy? I do not know. Where do I come from? I do not know.
And yet, facts about battlefield tactics and weaponry come to me easily.
I remember the KAN-SEN, the Sirens, X, and the Antiochus, all without issue.
There is some knowledge of a test site alpha, a Dr. Anzeel and Dr. Aoste, and a Zero as well.
Then there's the brooch and handkerchief in my hand... These I don't recognize.
Dammit... Some of my memories are just gone.
How did this happen? Why did it happen?
There's that purple-haired woman I spoke to...
She told me her name... What was it?
Why do I suddenly remember her, anyway?
I write down all my thoughts and memories in a notepad while I navigate this maze of remembrance.
After a while, I've pieced together enough fragmented memories to create a picture of who I am.

sequence: My name is {playername}. I come from a place known as test site alpha.
I'm Dr. Anzeel's assistant and a collaborator to Dr. Aoste.
I've been involved in numerous research projects concerning KAN-SEN and the Antiochus.
I've worked in scientific research, education, and now in the navy.
I've commanded in many successful battles.
I've fought against the META... then I fought against X.
And that's all I can remember.

Directional Creation.say: Well, it's far from exhaustive, but it gives me some direction.
Still don't have the faintest clue about where I am, though.
My first instinct is to get out of here...
The only problem is, I don't see any way out.
Rising out of the ruins, I take my communicator out of my pocket and try to make a call. No response.
In the midst of my confusion, a girl appears out of the flames around me.
Huh?
Why are you out here?
Sorry? You know who I am?
Have we met before?
I... don't remember.
So how come you know who I am?
Well... I don't remember that, either.
Oookay... How did you get here in the first place?
Hate to sound like a broken record, but I don't remember.
Of course you don't.
If you don't mind me asking, do you know where we are?
What does it matter? It's not like you'll remember.
Here's what you should do – sit there all pretty and wait for rescue to arrive.
Rescue? Who's coming to rescue me?
What does it matter? It's not like you'll remember.
I'm sorry. I have a bad case of memory loss.
Ugh...
Yes, that's pretty obvious. You're also the first person not to scream in fear at the sight of me.
Why would I be scared of you? And don't say "it doesn't matter."
Again – it's not like you'll remember even if I tell you.
Bye.
She turns around gracefully and leaves.
She's gone...
Well, she told me to wait, so I guess that's what I'll do.
I'll go through what I can remember one more time meanwhile.
Dammit... Why did I have to forget everything?

sequence: Return From the Beyond - The End
領域外からの帰還  一 記憶スパイラル

記憶スパイラル.say: 天城を復活させた後、指揮官と艦船たちは重桜を覆う特異点「ナラク」を脱出しようとした――

sequence: アカギ量産艦
指揮デッキ
帰還中

記憶スパイラル.say: 外は塵だらけなのに、本当にフネで移動できるんだ…
――移動開始から3時間、今の所概ね順調ってところか。このまま上手く帰れるといいが…
指揮官様、あとどれぐらいかかります…？
――オブザーバーの計算では…このアカギ型量産艦の速力だとあと7時間はかかるな
7時間…ってことは全部で10時間は越えそうね…
世界サンプルに入った時は一瞬だったのに
――回り道をしたから仕方ないさ
――それに重桜本島からNA海域中心まで十時間少々で行けるとしたら、そこまで遅くはないしな
言われてみれば確かに……！
ところで、NA海域にいる子たちにとってはどれぐらい経っているのかしら？
――7時間以上経っているはずだ。オブザーバーも数式を送ってきただけで、詳しい説明をしてくれなくてな
――赤城も一度見てみるか？
いいえ、大丈夫ですわ
指揮官様こそ、もう随分とお疲れでしょう？
ここは私がいますから、指揮官様は先に休んでいてくださいませ
――まだ平気だ。それに赤城の量産艦の艦橋に来るのは初めてだから
――過ごしやすさでいえばアカギよりシナノのほうが良かったと思うが、まさか赤城がこっちを選ぶとは…
確かに居住性はシナノのほうが優れています
ただ……私はやっぱりあれを乗艦にするには抵抗がありましたわ
――オブザーバーも同じことを言っていたな
――何か引っかかっていることでもあるのか…？
いえ。ただの縁起的なものとでも思ってくださいませ
突然、耳元にカードをシャッフルする音が聞こえ始め――
空間が紅い霧に覆われた……
明るい部屋の中、黒板の前にいる人影が声をかけてきた。
ちょっと助手？ちゃんと聞いている？！
今のはとっても大事よ！
おーい…！まだ寝るんじゃないわ！もう少し持ちこたえて――
広いオフィスの中、少しずぼらな印象の女性が名刺を渡してきた。
OXS商業連合のコレットよ
改めて、仲良くやりましょう。{playername}さん
暗い空間の中、モニターの中に誰かの姿が表示された。
{playername}！実験がついに成功しましたわ！
ふふ、さすがオースタとつるんでいるだけはありますのね
ええ、この研究で……頭の硬い連中に目に物見せてあげましょう♪
重苦しい会議室の中、円卓を囲むように座っている無数の影が目に入った。
会議はこれにて終了だ。残念だが、わしらの修正案は「理事評議会」で採決されなかった
よって、計画は変わらず、元々の案で進行する
そろそろ決断の時だ。{playername}将軍
教室の中、少女が目の前にあるらくがき帳を見せてくれた。
……せんせい……アンカレッジ……うまくかけた……？
……せんせい……あした……もういっちゃうの……
……せんせい……いかないで……
銀色の海で、艦船たちが戦っていた。
指揮官……？！
どうしてまだここに……？
サラトガちゃん、指揮官を早く連れて行って…！
しき…きか…ん……指揮官…！
無限の光景が目まぐるしく現れては消え―
……聞こえ……
まるで脳が高速で回転する遠心機に放り込まれたかのように――
聞こえる……！？
意識が螺旋の中で途切れ、分解し、沈んでいく――
指揮官……！
廻り続けていた意識がようやく元に戻った。
ここはアカギ量産艦の艦橋の指揮デッキ。そして目の前には焦りを見せる仲間たちの姿が――
……もう、本当にびっくりしたわ
目を開けたまま意識を失ってたわよ！声をかけても全く反応しなかったし…
――意識を失ってた…？えっと、どれぐらい続いた…？
少なくとも1分は！…ねえ指揮官、何かあったの？
（いや、あんなに色んな場面を体験させられたのに、現実では1分しか経っていない……）
――大丈夫だ。ちょっと疲れてただけだろう
ならよかったわ。…随分と派手にボーっとしてたわね
指揮官様のことだから心配するのは分かりますけど、あんな焦り方をしてはいけませんわ
3回目の呼びかけで目が覚めてなければ、危うく全艦に警報が出るところでした
私がいなければ大事になっていましたわ
……慎重すぎて悪かったわね
指揮官様、一度休んだほうがいいですわ
――ああ。ありがとう、赤城
（なぜああなったかは分からないが……正直このままではとても集中できないな…）
瑞鶴にお菓子を休憩室に運ばせています。まだ時間がかかりますし、小腹を空かせてはいけませんわ
――気を使わせてしまったな
はいはい、赤城は量産艦の操艦で忙しいし、私が指揮官を休憩室まで案内するわよ
そう言いながら、メンフィスはこっちに体を寄せて肩を支えてくれた。
無理しちゃダメ。こっちよ
待って。どうしてあなたが指揮官を案内するのかしら？
必要だからよ。だったら代わりにあなたが行けば？
言ってくれるじゃない。ならそこの果物も一緒に持っていきなさい
赤城はいつの間にかテーブルに置かれていたフルーツの盛り合わせを指差した。
手で皮を剥いて、指揮官様に一口ずつ食べさせてさしあげるの。あなたはそんなことも分からないの？
ふん、遠慮しないで持っていきなさい
はあ……
一瞬うろたえて見せたが、メンフィスはフルーツの皿を手に取った。
待って……まさか赤城…指揮官にそんなことをしてきたの……？！
くっ……ペースに乗せられてはダメよ
指揮官、早く休憩室に行くわよ！

sequence: 領域外からの帰還  二 竜宮の策

竜宮の策.say: 「ナラク」を顕現させた儀式の中心だった竜宮城は今、海中に戻っていた。
青、金、菫色の光が交錯する幻の空の下で、重桜の艦船たちが忙しく動いていて――
皆さん、儀式とともに現れた敵の掃討が終わりました
これで竜宮城の安全は確保されました
こっちの損害の確認も終わりました
外層の損傷は35％、中間層は24％、内層は16％……
思ってたよりもひどい状況ですね…
はい。ただ物資の備蓄は十分ですから、外部から資源を搬入してもらわなくても十分修復可能かと
よかったです～。時間はどれぐらい掛かりそうですか？
3日はかかりますね
3日もですか…「大結界」が受けたナラクの侵食もひどいものですし、これ以上何も起きないことを願うばかりです…
じゃあ、そろそろ「要枢（ようすう）」を設置し始めようか？
今から設置すれば、伊吹たちの修復とほぼ同時に完了できるの
そしたら一緒に儀式を執り行い、竜宮城の力で「大結界」の復元を行えるわ
うん。それで行きましょう～
その時、空から一縷の光が艦船たちの前に降り注ぎ、そしてヒトの形へと変わっていった。
雲仙さん？！
お疲れ様です。皆さん
大和さんからの言付けがあります――
金色の光が瞬き、次の瞬間、雲仙が纏っていた俗世離れな雰囲気がまるで別人かのように変わった。
「竜宮城の様子は如何に？」
予想よりはひどく損傷していますね。「大結界」の修復が始まるのは3日後になるかと…
「よい」
「して、件の任は？」
あっちのほうは回収が順調に進んでいますよ
「組み直したら、オロチと共に『返魂の儀』の要枢に置くように」
分かりました
大和さんは「返魂の儀」の準備に戻り、私もこれ以上の要件はありませんので、これにて失礼します
雲仙が手を振ると、艦船たちの前の光がぱっと四散した。
ふぅ…「返魂の儀」が無事に行われるためにも、重桜の「大結界」を早く直しませんと
では皆さん、仕事に戻りましょう～

sequence: 領域外からの帰還  三 解離
アカギ量産艦
休憩室
帰還中

解離.say: 休憩室に入ると、テーブルにはすでに何皿かの重桜菓子が置かれていた。
へえ～、随分と手の込んだお菓子ね…
フルーツの盛り合わせを隣に置き、メンフィスが重桜菓子に興味津々に見ていた。
エウロパとも東煌とも違うわね……
重桜菓子ってどんなものかしら？指揮官、食べてみる？
皿に置かれていたお団子を渡してきた。
――お団子？
そう！重桜のお団子よ。たしかうるち米を粉にして作るものだっけ？
味は……赤いからあんこなのかな？
ねえ指揮官、この団子…1個もらっちゃってもいい…？
――別に構わないよ。たくさんあるし
これって……全艦警報？！
…？！指揮官、気を付けて――
フネが急に大きく揺れ、体が思いっきり投げ出されたように感じた。
（違う……体ではなく…意識も…？！）
（紙…？カードがシャッフルされる音…？）
巨大な耳鳴りでかろうじて意識を保った。
（今度は……どこか高速移動中の機械か……？）
眼の前では不気味な青色の光が広がっている。
（体が動かない……関節と筋肉が言うことを聞かないようだ……）
（でも金縛りの感じとも違う………）
……こんなに早く追いついてくるとは思いませんでした
（この声……どこかで聞いたような……）
計画の本質に気づいた？
それとも、「敵」は我々が想定していたよりも徹底的に封鎖しているのかしら？
引き続きデコイを放ってください。追手を分散させて、違う座標に案内してください
この「世紀」から離れれば安全です
分かったわ
声が消えてなくなった。
（2つの声…片方は記憶のどこかにあったような気がするが、もう片方は全く聞き覚えがない）
（それ以前に声にノイズが多くよくわからなかった…）
（……いや、今はこの状況を脱するのが先だ）
どうしてか手足は全く動かせないが、目は自由に動かせる。
精神を集中して、とりあえず周りを観察していくと――
（あれ？自分の鼻が見えない……？）
（普通は意識しないが…見えないなんてことはないはず……）
（いや、まさかな。まさかとは思うが……）
（体が動かないのは言うことを聞かないのではなく、体そのものが――）
恐ろしい考えが脳裏をよぎった。
自分の感情に呼応してか、空間が震え始めた。
激しく揺れ始めた空間に、意識が砕かれそうになり――
突然揺れが小さくなり、しばらくして完全に収まった。
意識が朦朧としている中、青い花の海と……女性の姿が目に入った。
空に青い花びらが舞い踊り、風に銀色の髪がなびいて――
すべてが、一瞬にして白い光に包まれた。
光が消えると、もうひとりの「メンフィス」が目の前に現れた。
おかえり、指揮官
――……メンフィス？
私よ。でも……さっきまであなたと話していたメンフィスじゃないの
メンフィスなら、フネに損傷がないか確認に行かせたわ
もっとも、あの程度の揺れでは損傷を受けるはずないけどね
――苦労をかけてしまったな
あの子も好きでやっている節があるから
それより、具合は大丈夫？気分が悪くなったりしてないかしら？
――平気だ
――「ヘレナ」といい、いつも突然現れるな…
……あなたを助けるために決まっているじゃない
……じゃなくてっ。むしろあなたを助けに来られてよかったわ
ヘレナがあんな計画を立てたせいよ。あなたたちが回り道をしなければ、私の出番なんて来ないはずだったのに
――あんな計画って…？
な、なんでもないわ。ただの言い間違いよ
――…分かった。ちなみにさっきの警告と揺れは何事なんだ？
――それとさっきまた急に意識がなくなったけど…一体どうなってるんだ…？
一つずつ説明させて。まず警報のことだけど、これはナラクが「逆巻いた」から「塵」も不安定になったのよ
――「逆巻いた」？
うん。ナラクの中で不定期に発生する現象よ
「逆巻く」現象が発生すると、中にいる存在を深部に引きずり込む危険があるわ
あなたが急に意識を失ったことも…「逆巻いた」影響だと思う
でも大丈夫、もう危険地帯から脱出したわよ
――…やっぱり特異点の中では油断できないな
――そうだ。こっちの意識が回復するまでに何分経ってた？
7分ちょっとぐらい？8分未満ってところね
（さっきはぼーっとしていたし、今回は意識消失ときた…おまけに時間もだんだん長くなっている…？）
なんだかすごく疲れてるようだし、休んだほうがいいわよ？
同時刻・ある特殊空間にて――
これで2回目ね。もしかしてこの経路の制御が弱まってる？
「タワー」のリソースを転用して安定させるわ。ナビはあなたがやって
あとこの権限も渡すから、うまく使いなさい
空にある星々のように、オブザーバーの瞳に青い輝きが瞬いた。
これは…「タワー」の権限？！
認証プロセスが別物じゃなければ、「自然演算システム」みたいね！
前からとんでもない子だって聞いてたけど、噂通りすごいわね。おまけにこんなに「多才」だなんて…
「タワー」の力さえあれば、新しいネットワークを構築するのも可能なのね
ねえ…「タワー」って一体どんな存在なの？
話が多いわ。やるべきことに集中して
うふふ、もちろん！珍しくやる気が湧いて来たから安心なさい♪

sequence: 領域外からの帰還  四 彼岸の手助け

彼岸の手助け.say: 水面の上で、「御狐」が奉納の舞を捧げていた。
空にある星々の軌跡は流れる光とともに変わり続け――
一輪、また一輪と月が満ち、陰り、やがて流れる光の一部となっていく。
……やがて、天穹には月が二輪のみ残されていた。
儀式が終わり、輝く星々があるべき場所へと戻ったかに見えた。
……「返魂の儀」の準備？
帰って早々、とんでもないものを見せてくれたものだ……
力を貸し出すのはともかく、ここまでしてやることはないのでは…？
お主に痛い目を遭わせたのだ。それだけで余の注目に値する
それで、此度の「窺視」の結果は？
長門さまの見立てた通り、と
だが所詮はセイレーンの実験場の存在に過ぎない、どんなに強かろうと……
お主のような例外にはなれぬ、と？
左様。お認めにならなくても、私たちと彼女たちは……すでに存在の概念からして違うぞ
それがどうした？
――神とて強弱優劣が存在する、という意味よ
とにかく、報復は諦める。お主の計画も支持しない
しばらくは暇させてもらうぞ
良い。お主の成すべきことを成せ

ただ…操られていたとは言え、今「精神干渉」に関する知識を持っているのは赤城、あなたしかいませんので
天城姉さま……確かにこの現象は精神干渉と似ていますわ
ただ…同じ場所にいる私たちはなぜ干渉を受けていないのでしょうね？
………考えられる可能性は2つあります
一、この状況を作り出した者が近くにいて、そして干渉する相手を精密に操作できる
でも、これではなぜ「私たち」に干渉しないのかを説明できません
二、私たちの体か精神には何か特殊な因子があり、そのおかげで相手の精神干渉を受けずにいる
つまり、相手の干渉は「私たちには」効かないということですわ
でも、確かに私たちは指揮官様のことを覚えていますが、視覚的に指揮官様を認識できなくなっています
結局これでは「相手の干渉を受けていない」ことは部分的にしか成立しません
それに、私たちが持っている特殊な因子があるとすれば、おそらく……
「ナラクから戻ってきた」という一点だけですわね
もしかしたら私たちが知らず知らずのうちに「ナラク」からなにかを持ち帰ってきてしまったせいで……
……信濃、あなたはどう思います？
……汝と違い、この会場……精神干渉の痕跡を感じ取れぬ…
おそらく此度の異変、ただの「精神干渉」の一言では片づけられぬと……
状況は私たちが思っているよりもずっと深刻…と、仰りたいのですね
ええ……大和も妾の意見に賛同し申す……
あれ？信濃さんの意見に賛同したのは……大和さん？！
大和さんはここにいるのですか？！
いや、おらぬ…
信濃、あなた…大和とずっと連絡取り合っているの？
妾とて、ここから大和と連絡取るのは叶わぬ……
されど……大和は先程、妾に連絡してきた……
「落ち着いて、皆には知られてはならぬ」
「世界博覧会、サディア会場…重桜パビリオンの庭園に向かうように」
「そうすれば、此度の危機を打開できよう」
「{playername}のために、妾たち自身のために」…と
あの大和にそこまで言わせるほどだなんて……ちっ…
指揮官のことを、忘れるわけにはいかぬ……
{playername}の存在を、この世界から消されたままにはさせぬ……
ええ。赤城の指揮官様を…失ってたまるものですか…
天城姉さま、みんな、早く出発しますわ！

指向性構築.say: 星空の下で、軋む鋼鉄の悲鳴が鳴り響く。
ここに飛ばされてから、頭の中に2つのことが浮かび上がった。
一つ、「ここの戦闘は終わったばかりだ」――硝煙の匂いから分かる。
二つ、「自分は{playername}だ」――当然と言えば当然だが。
ただし、ここがどこか、何が起きたかは分からない。
思い出そうにも、記憶がまるで霧に覆われているようにぼんやりとしている。
一応ちゃんと思い出せるものもあるが、はっきりとしないもの、全然思い出せないものもいっぱいある。
――自分は{playername}。これだけははっきりと分かる
――今着ている服は、軍の上級士官の制服だ
――どの軍に所属しているのか、どこからやってきたのかは分からないが…

――「KANSEN」、セイレーン、「エックス」と「アンチエックス」…これも問題ない

――手に持っているプローチとハンカチ……これは分からない
――ふむ……どうやら記憶が一部飛んでいるみたいだ
――そしてなぜこのようなことが起きたかと言えば……
――この間会った紫髪の子…確か名前は……
――名前は何て言ってたっけ……？
――そもそも、どうして急にこのことを思いついたのか……？
考えること、思い出したことをメモ帳に書き起こしながら、記憶の迷宮の出口を辿っていく。
ちょっと時間がかかったが、なんとかバラバラの記憶の中で自分の今の人物像を構築できた――

sequence: 아카기 양산함
